upasargachandrika.example_text: 'saniHSvAsa ivAdarSaScandramA na prakASate' (rA॰3.22.13) vyaktiM na yAti vispazwaM nekzyata ityarTaH
'tAvuBO sma prakASete puzpitAviva kiMSukO' kiMSukavat pratIyete ityAha
'tasyEte kaTitA hyarTAH prakASante mahAtmanaH' (Sve॰u॰6.23) vyaktA dfSyA BavantItyAha
'dvAriRaM tApasA UcU rAjAnaM ca prakASaya' (BA॰Adi॰126.10) AgatAnno nivedayetyarTaH
'kadAcitkupitaM mitraM sarvadozaM prakASayet' (cARakya॰) guhyaM sarvadozaM parasmE kaTayedityarTaH
'tA vepaTuparItASca rAjYaH prARezu SaNkitAH pratisrotastfRAgrARAM sadfSaM saYcakASire' (rA॰2.65.14).. saYcakASire=pratibaBuH
'asaByAH saByasaNkASAH saByAScAsaByadarSanAH' (BA॰SAM॰111.65) saByasaNkASAH=saByasanniBAH=saByasadfSAH
'na sannikASayed DarmaM vivikte cArajAScaret' (BA0 ASva0 4625) prakASayedityarTaH
'varRAvakASamapi me paSya pARqava yAdfSam' (BA0 vi0 2015) varRAvakASo dIptisaNkoca iti nIlakaRWaH avarudDaH kASo'vakASaH prAdiH avaSabdaH prAyaSo'sAkalyamAcazwa uttarapadArTasya
'uBayato mAMsEH saMCannaM nAvakASate' (Sa0 brA0 87420) nAvakASate na dfgvizayatAM yAti
'ihi tisraH parAvataH…DenA indrAvacAkaSat' (f0 83222)
'janAnAM DenA avacAkaSad vfzA' (f0 10436)
'antarikzeRa patati viSvA rUpAvacAkaSat' (f0 101364) ihodAhftizvavakASatirdarSanArTe prayuktaH avaSca darSanasya nimnABimuKatAmAha
'yAni tasyAH (SamyAH) vakASAni divyarUpARyamanyata' (BA0 vi0 520) vakASAni avakASAni suzirasTAnAni kowarAKyAni
'sa tEH krIqanDanuzmadBirvyogni vIro vyakASata' (rA0 54010) vyakASata=aBAsata
'SreRIkftA vyakASanta krOYcAH' (BA0 54010)
'vicAkaSaccandramA naktameti' (f0 12410) BUyo BUyo BAsamAnaH
'Aditya iva taM deSaM kftsnaM sarvaM vyakASayat' (BA0 Adi0 21619) prAkASayadityarTaH
'sa yatsa AkASa Aditya eva saH etasmin hyudite sarvamidamAkASate' (jE0 u0 1252) AkASate prakASate BAti BAsate
'ati no'rjasyAkASaM naH kurviti' (E0 brA0 342) AkASamavakASam
'AkASaM tadanAkASaM cakrurBImAmbuvAhakAH' (rA0 3237) anAkASamaprakASaM tamisrAvaguRWitam
'sa sampratyuraH puruzamAkASya' (Sa0 brA0 74143) AkASya samprekzya
'AkASavato vE sa lokAnaBi siDyati' (CAM0 u0 7122) AkASavato'vakASavato viSaNkawAn
'prezyantaM nikASaM me kAlenAlpIyasA punaH' (BA0 31631) nikASaH sAmIpyam nIkASa iti tu pARinIyAH
'kvacinmaRinikASodAm (nadIm)' (rA0 29510) sPawikasadfSodakAmityAha
'gajayUTanikASena balena mahatA vftaH' (rA0 65721) gajayUTanikASena kariGawAsadfSena nIkASa iti tu pARinIyA icCanti
'dikzvatIkASAn karoti' (tE0 saM0 611) atIkASA dvArARi BittO Cadizi vA'tItya vyavaDAnaM kASanta iti
'sa uccakASe DavalodarodaraH' (BA0 pu0 1112) uccEScakASe atitarAM didIpe
'tayA nastanvA SantamayABi cAkaSIhi' (vA0 saM0 162) aBicAkaSIhi=udBAsaya viBApaya
'Dftasya DArA aBi cAkaSImi' (f0 4585) aBicAkaSImi sampaSyAmi prekze
niBasaMkASanIkASapratIkASopamAdaya iti sadfSaparyAyAnpaWatyamaraH
